name: 14-Day RSI
definition: 14 日相對強弱指標，衡量近期上漲動能 vs 下跌動能的比率

name: 10-Day MACD Trend
definition: MACD DIF 線（EMA12 - EMA26）的 10 日 EMA 平滑

name: 12-Month Minus 1-Month Momentum
definition: 從 t-252 到 t-21 的價格報酬率（跳過最近 1 個月避免反轉效應）

name: 1-Month Price Reversal
definition: 近 1 個月（21 日）報酬率取負

name: 6-Month Price Reversal
definition: 近 6 個月（126 日）報酬率取負

name: 9-Month Price Momentum
definition: 近 9 個月（189 日）累積報酬率

name: 52-Week High-Low Position
definition: (52W High - 當日收盤) / (52W High - 52W Low)，範圍 [0, 1]

name: Closing Price to 52-Week High
definition: 收盤價 / 過去 52 週最高價

name: Volatility-Adjusted 12-Month Return
definition: 12 個月累積報酬 / 年化波動度

name: Share Turnover (21-Day Avg)
definition: 過去 21 日平均周轉率

name: 1-Year Change in Share Turnover
definition: (turnover - mean(turnover, 252)) / std(turnover, 252) — 1 年標準化 z-score

name: 5-Day Volume Signal
definition: log( mean(vol, 5) / mean(vol, 60) )

name: 5-Day Money Flow Premium
definition: 5 日 VWAP / 當日收盤 - 1

name: 20-Day CV of Volume-to-Price
definition: 20 日 (vol / close) 的變異係數 = std / mean

name: 1-Month Realized Volatility (annualized)
definition: 過去 21 日報酬的標準差 × √252（年化）

name: 12-Month Realized Volatility (annualized)
definition: 過去 252 日報酬的標準差 × √252

name: Amihud Illiquidity (21-day)
definition: mean( |daily_return| / dollar_volume, 21 ) × 1e6

name: 90-Day Price Coefficient of Variation
definition: std(close, 90) / mean(close, 90)

name: 130-Day Minimum Daily Return
definition: 過去 130 日最大單日跌幅（最負的 roi）

name: Earnings to Price (= 1/PER)
definition: 1 / per

name: Book to Price (= 1/PBR)
definition: 1 / pbr

name: Sales to Price (= 1/PSR)
definition: 1 / psr_tej

name: Dividend Yield
definition: div_yid / 100

name: Log Market Capitalization
definition: log(mktcap)

name: 9-Day Stochastic K
definition: 標準 KD(9) 的 K 值；RSV = (close - 9 日最低) / (9 日最高 - 9 日最低) × 100，K = ⅔·K[t-1] + ⅓·RSV

name: Bollinger Bands %B (20-Day)
definition: %B = (close - Lower) / (Upper - Lower)；Upper/Lower = MA(20) ± 2σ

name: 20-Day BIAS
definition: (close - MA20) / MA20 — direction=-1（均值回歸假說）

name: Granville MA60/200 Trend Score
name_zh: 葛蘭碧 MA 趨勢評分
definition: (close/MA60 - 1) × sign(MA60 - MA200)

name: 10-Day Limit-Up Count
definition: 過去 10 日漲停次數（limit_fg = '+'）

name: 20-Day SMA Position
definition: (收盤 − 20 日 MA) / 20 日 MA — direction=+1（趨勢追蹤假說）

name: 12-Day EMA Position
definition: (收盤 − 12 日 EMA) / 12 日 EMA — 對近期權重高的均線位置指標

name: 10-Day WMA Position
definition: (收盤 − 10 日 WMA) / 10 日 WMA — 加權移動平均位置（線性遞減權重）

name: DMA(10, 50)
definition: DMA = MA(10) − MA(50) — 短期 vs 長期均線的差距

name: BBI (Bull-Bear Index)
definition: BBI = (MA3 + MA6 + MA12 + MA24) / 4 相對收盤位置：(close − BBI) / BBI

name: TRIX(12)
name_zh: 三重指數平滑均線 TRIX
definition: 對價格做三層 EMA 平滑後取 1 日變動率：roc(EMA(EMA(EMA(close, n), n), n), 1)

name: KDJ J Value (9-Day)
definition: J = 3K − 2D — 比 K、D 更敏感的擺盪指標

name: Williams %R (14-Day)
definition: %R = (max_high − close) / (max_high − min_low) × (-100)，輸出 [-100, 0]

name: CCI(20)
definition: CCI = (TP − MA(TP, n)) / (0.015 × meanDev(TP, n))，TP = (H+L+C)/3

name: Momentum (10-Day)
definition: MTM(n) = close[t] − close[t-n] — 絕對價差形式的動量指標

name: Rate of Change (10-Day)
definition: ROC(n) = close[t] / close[t-n] − 1 — 百分比形式的動量

name: Chande Momentum Oscillator (14)
definition: CMO = (Σ漲幅 − Σ跌幅) / (Σ漲幅 + Σ跌幅) × 100，輸出 [-100, 100]

name: On-Balance Volume 21D Rate of Change
definition: (OBV[t] - OBV[t-21]) / |OBV[t-21]| — OBV 21 天變化率

name: Volume Ratio (5-Day)
definition: vol[t] / mean(vol[t-5..t-1], 5) — 今天量相對於「前 5 日」均量（不含今天）

name: Volume Ratio Index (26)
definition: VR = (上漲日量總和 + 0.5×平盤量) / (下跌日量總和 + 0.5×平盤量) × 100

name: Money Flow Index (14)
definition: MFI = 100 − 100/(1 + 正MF/負MF)，TP = (H+L+C)/3，MF = TP × vol

name: Ease of Movement (14)
definition: EMV = ((H+L)/2 變動 × (H−L)) / vol，取 14 日均值

name: Average True Range (14)
definition: ATR = Wilder smoothing of TR；TR = max(H−L, |H−prevC|, |L−prevC|)

name: Keltner Channel Position (20)
definition: (close − EMA(20)) / ATR(20) — close 距中線的 ATR 倍數

name: Donchian Channel Position (20)
definition: (close − min_low) / (max_high − min_low)，輸出 [0, 1]

name: Parabolic SAR
definition: (close − SAR) / SAR — 收盤價相對於 SAR 的位置

name: Average Directional Index (14)
definition: ADX(n) = Wilder smoothing of DX；DX = |+DI − -DI| / (+DI + -DI) × 100

name: Psychological Line (12)
definition: PSY(n) = 過去 n 日上漲日數 / n

name: MA Convergence
definition: max(MA5, MA10, MA20) / min(MA5, MA10, MA20) − 1 — 三線發散度

name: Bullish Streak (5-Day)
definition: 過去 5 日內 close > open 的天數

name: Gap Up
definition: today_low_adj > yesterday_high_adj (1 / 0 二元值)

name: Gap Down
definition: today_high_adj < yesterday_low_adj (1 / 0 二元值)

name: Limit-Down Count (10-Day)
definition: 過去 10 日 limit_fg = '-' 的次數

name: Locked-at-Open-Up Count (10-Day)
name_zh: 10 日開盤即漲停鎖死次數
definition: 過去 10 日 limo_fg='Y' AND limit_fg='+' 的次數（鎖漲停）

name: Locked-at-Open-Down Count (10-Day)
name_zh: 10 日開盤即跌停鎖死次數
definition: 過去 10 日 limo_fg='Y' AND limit_fg='-' 的次數（鎖跌停）

name: Disposal Stock Active
definition: disp_fg = 'Y' 表示當日為處置股 (1) / 否 (0)

name: 14-Day Stochastic K
definition: 14 日窗口的 KD K 值（同 tech_kd9_k 操作子、只是窗口從 9 改 14）

name: Tower Line (3-Day Reversal)
definition: 今日收盤 > 過去 3 日（不含今天）最高收盤 → 1；否則 0（簡化版寶塔線）
